Usage: gokart <command> [flags]

GoKart scaffolds focused Go command-line applications.

Commands:
  new (create,init)      Create a new GoKart project.
    <project> ...        Project name.

  add                    Add integrations to a managed structured project.
    <integration> ...    Integration: sqlite, postgres, ai, or redis.

  version                Print the version number.

  config                 Show gokart configuration.
    show                 Print where gokart stores data.

Flags:
  -h, --help       Show context-sensitive help.
      --version    Print version information and quit.

Run "gokart <command> --help" for more information on a command.
